빌레몬서 1:1.content: Paul, a prisoner of Christ Jesus, and Timothy our brother, to Philemon, our beloved fellow worker,

빌레몬서 1:2.content: to the beloved Apphia, to Archippus our fellow soldier, and to the assembly in your house:

빌레몬서 1:3.content: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

빌레몬서 1:4.content: I thank my God always, making mention of you in my prayers,

빌레몬서 1:5.content: hearing of your love and of the faith which you have toward the Lord Jesus, and toward all the saints,

빌레몬서 1:6.content: that the fellowship of your faith may become effective in the knowledge of every good thing which is in us in Christ Jesus.

빌레몬서 1:7.content: For we have much joy and comfort in your love, because the hearts of the saints have been refreshed through you, brother.

빌레몬서 1:8.content: Therefore though I have all boldness in Christ to command you that which is appropriate,

빌레몬서 1:9.content: yet for love’s sake I rather beg, being such a one as Paul, the aged, but also a prisoner of Jesus Christ.

빌레몬서 1:10.content: I beg you for my child, whom I have become the father of in my chains, Onesimus,

빌레몬서 1:11.content: who once was useless to you, but now is useful to you and to me.

빌레몬서 1:12.content: I am sending him back. Therefore receive him, that is, my own heart,

빌레몬서 1:13.content: whom I desired to keep with me, that on your behalf he might serve me in my chains for the Good News.

빌레몬서 1:14.content: But I was willing to do nothing without your consent, that your goodness would not be as of necessity, but of free will.

빌레몬서 1:15.content: For perhaps he was therefore separated from you for a while, that you would have him forever,

빌레몬서 1:16.content: no longer as a slave, but more than a slave, a beloved brother, especially to me, but how much rather to you, both in the flesh and in the Lord.

빌레몬서 1:17.content: If then you count me a partner, receive him as you would receive me.

빌레몬서 1:18.content: But if he has wronged you at all or owes you anything, put that to my account.

빌레몬서 1:19.content: I, Paul, write this with my own hand: I will repay it (not to mention to you that you owe to me even your own self besides).

빌레몬서 1:20.content: Yes, brother, let me have joy from you in the Lord. Refresh my heart in the Lord.

빌레몬서 1:21.content: Having confidence in your obedience, I write to you, knowing that you will do even beyond what I say.

빌레몬서 1:22.content: Also, prepare a guest room for me, for I hope that through your prayers I will be restored to you.

빌레몬서 1:23.content: Epaphras, my fellow prisoner in Christ Jesus, greets you,

빌레몬서 1:24.content: as do Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke, my fellow workers.

빌레몬서 1:25.content: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit. Amen.
